title: lonicera italica var. atrosanguinea
intro: Lonicera italica var. atrosanguinea, also known as Italian honeysuckle, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountains of Italy and other parts of Europe. It is a type of honeysuckle plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Lonicera italica var. atrosanguinea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
